name: Complaint for Declaratory Judgment (Non-Liability of Debt)
description: A formal legal petition filed with a court requesting a declaration that you do not owe an alleged, disputed, or fraudulent debt.
content:
IN THE {{court_name}}

{{court_location}}

PLAINTIFF:
{{plaintiff_name}} (ID/SSN: {{plaintiff_id}})
Address: {{plaintiff_address}}

DEFENDANT (Alleged Creditor):
{{defendant_name}}
Address: {{defendant_address}}

COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY JUDGMENT (DECLARATION OF NON-LIABILITY)

INTRODUCTION:

The Plaintiff files this Complaint against the Defendant seeking a Declaratory Judgment that the Plaintiff does not owe the alleged debt of {{disputed_amount}} claimed by the Defendant{{#if reference_number}} under reference/account number {{reference_number}}{{/if}}.

STATEMENT OF FACTS:

The Defendant has unjustly and unlawfully demanded payment from the Plaintiff. The Plaintiff firmly asserts that no such debt exists, is legally owed, or is enforceable because:

{{reason_for_non_liability}}

RELIEF SOUGHT / PRAYER FOR JUDGMENT:

Wherefore, the Plaintiff respectfully prays that this Honorable Court enter a judgment:

  1. Declaring that the Plaintiff is not indebted to the Defendant for the amount claimed;
  2. Ordering the Defendant to immediately cease all collection activities, including any current or future garnishments or liens;
  3. Awarding the Plaintiff all costs, expenses, and reasonable attorney's fees incurred in bringing this action; and
  4. Granting such other and further relief as the Court deems just and proper.

PLAINTIFF (Or Authorized Counsel)

{{plaintiff_name}}
Date: {{formatDate filing_date}}

Signature: ________________

fields.name: court_name
fields.label: Name of the Court
fields.placeholder: e.g., Superior Court, Small Claims Court

fields.name: court_location
fields.label: Location / Jurisdiction of Court
fields.placeholder: e.g., County of Los Angeles, State of California

fields.name: reason_for_non_liability
fields.label: Reason Why Debt is Not Owed
fields.placeholder: e.g., The debt was paid in full on [Date], Identity theft, Goods were never delivered.
